claims.summary: Mirror, Dialogue, and Witness form an intentional relational loop with distinct roles.
claims.disposition: verify current mode contracts, provenance ownership, and fluid canonical action parsing

claims.summary: Chamber schema drift must be visible instead of silently becoming generic insufficient context.
claims.disposition: verify nested-field fallback, missing-field diagnostics, newest-valid recovery, and no-panic tests

claims.summary: Fraying must require the exact dispersal threshold while high pressure alone remains a separate signal.
claims.disposition: verify below, at, and above threshold lingering regressions and fraying-unknown handling

claims.summary: Astrid as unsettled or moving gravity participant must remain distinguishable from relational instability and correspondence state.
claims.disposition: verify Witness friction classification, correspondence trace, and next-action parser tests
